name: Euler's Market
description: A visionary paradigm of systemic command. Euler's Market transcends conventional interfaces, offering an obsidian void where mathematical precision and true digital autonomy converge. Experience secure, zero-trust digital transactions forged through absolute mathematical freedom.

brand.name: Euler's Market
brand.description: Inspired by Leonhard Euler's transition from sight to systemic command. We operate in the deep obsidian void, pierced only by sharp, glowing cyan vectors of absolute logic.

offers.description: Uncompromised agentic transactions secured by local-first persistence.
